notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Weston Wilson. Aaron Judge to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Tyler O'Neill scores. Coby Mayo to 3rd. Leody Taveras out at 2nd. Jeremiah Jackson out at 1st.
